title: 🔬Why There Is No "AlphaFold for Materials" https://latent.space/p/materials Materials Science is a force for good everywhere in our lives, from your clothes to the computers you use. We catch up on AI for Materials Discovery with Prof. Heather Kulik of @KulikGroup, one of the first materials scientists to realize that there was alpha in combining computational tools with data driven modeling... and we test out some predictions she makes on the pod with Opus 4.6 and GPT 5.4!
